prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划:
2021–2025年物理类（含原理科）最低位次分别为约6893→1535→379→329→390名。2021年因核工程与核技术专业单独招生导致位次异常偏大，2022年起回归正常区 间。2023–2025年稳定在329–390名之间，2025年基准约390名，近3年波动幅度约60名，整体呈高位趋稳态势；该校在安徽省物理类招生计划：2021年40人→2022 年18人→2023年12人→2024年15人→2025年15人→2026年20人。2026年较2025年扩招5人（增幅33%），扩招幅度较大，将缓解部分竞争压力，推动最低位次数字后移。
3. 【学校层次】上海交通大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名连续多年稳居第4名（2021–2026年），属C9联盟成员，综合实力稳居全国顶尖行列。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及学术不端（撤稿量较大）及校园安全事件，但作为顶尖名校，负面舆情对报考热度的实质性影响有限。抖音热度排名第42 位（较热），短视频曝光量处于中上水平。2021年曾出现投档线异常信号（河南理科华五倒数第一），但近年未见明显断档记录；拥有28个A-及以上学科，其中 A+学科包括计算机科学与技术、机械工程、材料科学与工程、生物学、管理科学与工程、工商管理、临床医学、口腔医学、外国语言文学等。招生专业中电子信息类（IEEE试点班 ）、人工智能、计算机永强试验班等均对应A+/A级学科，学科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业2024–2026年持续高热推荐，人工智 能方向受关注但存在分化观望。安徽省2026年高考总报名约451,000人，较2025年（约462,179人）略有减少；物理类考生占比约69%，估算约313,000人，较2025年（320,779人） 小幅下降，竞争压力略有缓解。；上海交通大学位于上海市，安徽省非其本地省份。2025年该校在安徽招生占比约2.84%（1 7人/598人），属中等偏下水平，地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年物理类扩招33%（15→20人）这一核心利好因素；同时 安徽省物理类考生总数小幅下降、学校顶尖层次对高分考生持续吸引、热门工科专业（计算机/AI/电子信息）报考热度不减等因素相互制衡。在2025年基准390名基础上，预计202 6年最低位次小幅后移至约480名，区间432–528名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including former Science Category) were approximately 6893 → 1535 → 379 → 329 → 390. In 2021, due to separate enrollment for Nuclear Engineering and Nuclear Technology, the ranking was abnormally high, returning to normal range from 2022 onward. From 2023 to 2025, it stabilized between 329 and 390, with a baseline of about 390 in 2025. The fluctuation range in the past three years is about 60 places, showing a high-level stabilization trend. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Anhui Province: 2021: 40 → 2022: 18 → 2023: 12 → 2024: 15 → 2025: 15 → 2026: 20. In 2026, compared to 2025, there is an increase of 5 students (33% growth), a relatively large expansion that will alleviate some competitive pressure and push the minimum ranking number backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai Jiao Tong University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. It has consistently ranked 4th in the Soft Science China University Rankings for many years (2021–2026) and is a member of the C9 League, with comprehensive strength firmly among the top in the country. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct (large number of retractions) and campus safety incidents. However, as a top university, the actual impact of negative public opinion on application enthusiasm is limited. Its Douyin popularity ranks 42nd (relatively hot), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level. In 2021, there was an abnormal signal in the admission cut-off line (Henan Science Category ranked last among the C9), but no significant gaps have been seen in recent years. It has 28 A- or above disciplines, including A+ disciplines such as Computer Science and Technology, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Biology, Management Science and Engineering, Business Administration, Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, and Foreign Languages and Literature. Among the enrollment majors, Electronic Information (IEEE Pilot Class), Artificial Intelligence, and Computer Yongqiang Experimental Class correspond to A+/A-level disciplines, highlighting strong academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and other majors continue to be highly recommended from 2024 to 2026. Artificial Intelligence direction attracts attention but faces differentiated observation. In 2026, the total number of Anhui Province college entrance examination registrations is about 451,000, slightly decreasing from 2025 (about 462,179). Physics Category candidates account for about 69%, estimated at about 313,000, a slight decrease from 2025 (320,779), easing competitive pressure slightly. Shanghai Jiao Tong University is located in Shanghai, which is not a local province for Anhui. In 2025, the university's enrollment proportion in Anhui is about 2.84% (17 people/598 people), at a medium-low level, with limited influence from regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the core positive factor of a 33% enrollment expansion in Physics Category in 2026 (15→20 people), along with the slight decrease in the total number of Physics Category candidates in Anhui Province, the continuous attraction of the university's top tier to high-scoring students, and the sustained high enthusiasm for popular engineering majors (Computer/AI/Electronic Information), which balance each other. Based on the 2025 baseline of 390, the minimum ranking in 2026 is expected to slightly shift backward to about 480, with a range of 432–528.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Electronic Information (Computer Yongqiang Experimental Class)
- Artificial Intelligence (Top Talent Pilot Class)
- Electronic Information (IEEE Pilot Class, including Dual Degree Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Mechanical (Qian Xuesen Engineering Science Pilot Class, including Dual Degree Program)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics Direction, including Dual Degree Program)
- Electronic Information (Integrated Circuit Talent Class)
- Finance (Finance and Computer Dual Degree Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Economics and Management Experimental Class (including Dual Degree Program)
- Materials Science and Engineering (Xu Zuyao Honor Class)
- Embodied Intelligence (Top Talent Pilot Class)
- Robotics Engineering (Autonomous Intelligent Leading Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 480, range 432–528. Candidates with rankings at the lower limit (432) or below can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 top majors (Computer Yongqiang Experimental Class, Artificial Intelligence Top Talent Class); those with rankings in the middle of the range (about 480) are advised to mainly target Tier 2 with Tier 1 as a sprint; those near the upper limit (528) are advised to mainly use Tier 3 as a safety. Shanghai Jiao Tong University's enrollment in Anhui Physics Category in 2026 expands to 20 students, increasing admission opportunities compared to 2025.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including former Liberal Arts) were approximately 68 → 58 → 78 → 61 → 85. Overall, it fluctuated narrowly within the 55–85 range. The 2025 baseline is about 85, moving back 24 places from 2024 (61), showing a slight loosening trend. The enrollment plan for this university in Anhui Province for History Category: 1 person each in 2021–2023, 2 persons each in 2024–2025, and 2 persons in 2026, remaining stable for three consecutive years. The plan is stable, with no signals of expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, ranked 4th in the Soft Science Ranking, part of the C9 League, with top comprehensive strength. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, but the History Category only offers the Law Experimental Class, so the impact is limited. Douyin popularity ranks 42nd (relatively hot), with overall attention moderately high. The law discipline is rated A, highly corresponding to the History Category enrollment major (Law Experimental Class), with strong disciplinary strength. The popularity of the law major in 2024–2026 is differentiated and wait-and-see, with overall social application enthusiasm stable, but top law schools (Jiaotong University Law A) still attractive. The estimated number of History Category examinees in Anhui Province for 2026 is about 138,000, a slight decrease from 2025 (141,400), easing competition slightly.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Shanghai Jiao Tong University is located in Shanghai. Anhui examinees have a strong regional preference for Shanghai universities, but the History Category only enrolls 2 people, so regional factors have limited impact on overall rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: The enrollment plan for History Category has remained stable for three consecutive years (2 people), but considering factors such as the slight decrease in the total number of History Category examinees in Anhui Province, the differentiated and wait-and-see popularity of the law major, and the 2025 ranking already moving back 24 places from 2024, it is expected that the minimum ranking for 2026 will continue to slightly move back from the 85 baseline to about 90, with a range of 79–101.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Law Experimental Class (International Rule of Law Special Class) (including Law).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Law Experimental Class (including Dual Bachelor's Degree Program) (including Law; including Law-Economics Dual Bachelor's Degree Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 90, range 79–101. History Category only enrolls 2 people, making ranking competition extremely intense. Those with rankings within 79 can aim for the International Rule of Law Special Class; those around 90 can try both majors; those near 101 need to be cautious. It is recommended to also consider other universities as safety options.
